title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their role, performance, and departmental needs. To qualify, employees must have completed at least six months of service and demonstrate consistent performance that meets or exceeds expectations. Requests for remote or hybrid work should be submitted to your direct supervisor using the Remote Work Request Form at least four weeks prior to the desired start date. Once submitted, supervisors will review requests and provide feedback within two weeks. Expectations for remote work include maintaining regular communication with your team, attending scheduled meetings, and meeting deadlines. Employees must also ensure they have a suitable work environment that allows for productivity and confidentiality. For any questions or further clarification, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
